text: Sam is saving up for a bicycle that costs £150. He already has £30 saved. Each week he saves £10. How many more weeks will it take Sam to have enough money for the bicycle?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Find how much more Sam needs to save.
£150 − £30 = £120

Step 2: Find how many weeks it takes to save £120 at £10 per week.
£120 ÷ £10 = 12 weeks

The answer is 12 weeks.
